title: Thai Lee's Post
text:
Thank you Dr. Lisa Su for joining us at the SHI Spring Summit yesterday. I always enjoy our conversations and value your insights on leadership and what market leaders like AMD are doing to push the envelope of what's possible in computing and AI. Thank you to all of the SHI customers and partners who joined us at our largest summit ever ! Thank you all,
This is who he defended, by the way the TEA is investigating this teacher and he has been placed on administrative leave.
Do better. Show the world this isn't tolerated.
You shine ✨️ so brightly; thank you for being such an inspiration to all of us on this fellowship journey. In today's purpose driven society, it's so wonderful to see a woman stay true to herself ! Your grace and light ✨️ are extraordinary attributes! Peace, love & Blessings, Angel Fay
Congratulations on SHI’s continued growth
Hi 👋 Mrs Lee, I know this will add value to your roadmap. I am the owner of AIPC.COMPUTER and CHIPS.COMPUTER two premium .computer domains part of a much larger and curated portfolio. SmartDomain.Name/the-computer-collection
Great leaders supporting each other!
Great picture 😍 Congratulations ❤️🦐🦀🦞
